overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban street at night. The player follows a pedestrian along a sidewalk past residential shacks and utility poles, then continues through an intersection and turns into a parking lot with a retro-futuristic diner.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with mixed residential shacks and utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white jacket along the concrete sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing a white jacket and dark pants, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive yellow illuminated windows dominating the skyline
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and hanging electrical wires
large illuminated billboard with pink and white cherry blossom imagery
low-rise wooden buildings with corrugated metal roofs and green trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark neon-lit street with a distinctive yellow skyscraper visible in the distance. The camera follows a character in a white jacket walking along a sidewalk bordered by residential shacks on the left and a road on the right. Utility poles and wires line the street, and a pink neon billboard glows in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with gas station and digital billboards

events.description: the followed character turns right and exits the frame, leaving the camera walking alone

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk toward the intersection after the character exits view

entered.detail: green and white gas station canopy with neon lighting and fuel pumps
tall digital billboard displaying a white background with red X symbol

segments.scene_description: After the character exits the frame, the camera continues walking toward a major intersection. A gas station with green neon trim becomes prominent on the right, while the yellow skyscraper shifts to the left side of the frame. Vehicles pass by on the road as the camera approaches the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot in front of retro-futuristic diner with palm tree decorations

events.description: camera turns right off the sidewalk and enters the parking lot area

agents.ego_description: turning right into the parking lot and approaching the diner building entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the diner entrance

entered.detail: retro-futuristic diner with purple and pink neon signage, palm tree decorations, and art deco styling
empty billboard support frame structure without active display
yellow delivery van and dark sedan parked in the lot

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a parking lot, revealing a retro-futuristic diner with vibrant purple neon signage. Several vehicles are parked in the lot, and a few pedestrians stand near the entrance. The previous street elements including the gas station and yellow skyscraper fall out of view as the camera focuses on the diner building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban street that gradually shifts from a residential corridor into a vibrant commercial parking lot. It begins by following a character in a white jacket along a sidewalk lined with residential shacks and utility poles, with a yellow skyscraper and a pink neon billboard glowing in the distance. As the character exits the frame, the camera continues toward a major intersection where a gas station with green neon trim becomes prominent and the yellow skyscraper shifts to the left. The scene then turns right into a parking lot, causing the previous street elements to fall out of view as the focus shifts toward a retro-futuristic diner. Finally, the camera settles on the diner's vibrant purple neon signage and the pedestrians gathered near its entrance.
